_rules.cta_reuse: CTA/section-background images (role: cta-bg) SHOULD be reused across pages. Do NOT generate per-page CTA images. Use cta-bg-capabilities.webp for capability-related pages, cta-bg-home.webp for homepage, cta-bg-about.webp for about page. Max 3 CTA images total.
_rules.shared_images: modal-pcba-showcase.webp (inquiry modal) is shared across ALL pages. logo.webp is shared across ALL pages. Do not duplicate these.
_rules.no_reuse_rule: All hero, content, and explanatory images MUST be unique per page. Never reuse the same image for different page contexts.
